neighborhoods.name: Midtown Manhattan
neighborhoods.description: Central Manhattan neighborhood known for Times Square, Broadway theaters, and a high concentration of business and leisure hotels.

neighborhoods.name: Central Paris
neighborhoods.description: Historic city center close to major sights such as the Louvre, Notre-Dame, and the Seine, popular for boutique and upscale hotels.

neighborhoods.name: Shinjuku
neighborhoods.description: Vibrant Tokyo district with major transport hubs, shopping, dining, and a wide range of business and family-friendly hotels.

neighborhoods.name: The Loop
neighborhoods.description: Downtown Chicago business district bordered by the Chicago River and Lake Michigan, convenient for last-minute business and leisure stays.

neighborhoods.name: Miami Beach
neighborhoods.description: Beachfront resort area known for its Art Deco architecture, oceanfront hotels, and nightlife, a short drive from central Miami.

neighborhoods.name: Centro Storico
neighborhoods.description: Rome’s historic center featuring cobblestone streets, piazzas, and classic hotels within walking distance of major landmarks.

room_types.name: Classic Double Room
room_types.description: Comfortable double room ideal for weekend stays, with desk and French-style décor.

room_types.name: Superior Double Room
room_types.description: Larger double with small seating area and inner courtyard view.

room_types.name: Studio Suite with River View
room_types.description: Open-plan studio with sofa area and partial Seine view.

room_types.name: Family Room (4 Guests)
room_types.description: Spacious tatami-and-bed family room suitable for 2 adults and 2 children.

room_types.name: Standard Twin Room
room_types.description: Compact twin room close to Shinjuku Station.

room_types.name: Standard Double Room
room_types.description: Simple double room in Midtown Manhattan close to major sights.

room_types.name: Triple Room
room_types.description: Room for small groups, suitable for 3 adults or families.

room_types.name: Business Single Room
room_types.description: Compact single room ideal for same-day business stays in The Loop.

room_types.name: Standard Double Room
room_types.description: Comfortable double with city view and workspace.

room_types.name: Oceanview King Room
room_types.description: Bright room with balcony and full ocean view.

room_types.name: Oceanview Two Double Beds
room_types.description: Larger room facing the ocean, suitable for families.

room_types.name: Studio Suite
room_types.description: Open-plan studio with kitchenette, ideal for medium stays.

room_types.name: One-Bedroom Apartment
room_types.description: Apartment-style unit with separate living area and full kitchen.

room_types.name: Standard Harbor View Room
room_types.description: Cozy room overlooking the harbor promenade.

room_types.name: Family Room with Harbor View
room_types.description: Larger room with additional bedding suitable for families.

room_types.name: Deluxe Double Room
room_types.description: Elegant double room in Rome’s historic center with high ceilings and modern bathroom.

room_types.name: Classic Double Room
room_types.description: Alpine-style room with warm wooden interiors, some with mountain views.

rate_plans.name: Weekly Stay - 10% Off
rate_plans.description: Refundable weekly stay offer with 10% discount for stays of 7–21 nights between June 1 and August 31, 2026.

rate_plans.name: Flexible Rate - Room Only
rate_plans.description: Standard flexible rate with free cancellation up to 24 hours before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Flexible Oceanview Rate
rate_plans.description: Refundable flexible rate for oceanview rooms with free cancellation until 3 days before check-in.

rate_plans.name: Family Room - Free Cancellation
rate_plans.description: Family-friendly refundable rate for rooms accommodating children, with free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival.

rate_plans.name: Weekend City Break - Breakfast Included
rate_plans.description: Special weekend rate with breakfast included for stays of 2–3 nights over Friday–Sunday.

rate_plans.name: Same-Day Deal - Pay at Property
rate_plans.description: Last-minute same-day rate payable at the property; non-refundable after booking.

hotels.name: Paris Central Grand Hotel
hotels.description: Classic 4-star hotel in the heart of central Paris, offering stylish rooms with breakfast included options, ideal for city breaks and weekend stays.

hotels.name: Paris Riverfront Suites
hotels.description: All-suite property overlooking the Seine with spacious studios and suites, many with river views and easy access to major attractions.

hotels.name: Tokyo Family Inn Shinjuku
hotels.description: Family-friendly hotel near Shinjuku Station offering Japanese-style and Western rooms suitable for up to four guests, with easy access to shopping and transport.

hotels.name: Midtown Budget Hotel NYC
hotels.description: Practical Midtown Manhattan hotel within walking distance of Times Square and major subway lines, ideal for price-conscious groups and families.

hotels.name: Chicago Loop Business Inn
hotels.description: Business-focused hotel in Chicago9s Loop district with work-friendly rooms and convenient access to the financial center and public transit.

hotels.name: Oceanview Hotel Miami
hotels.description: Beachfront hotel on Miami Beach featuring balconies with ocean views, outdoor pool, and flexible refundable rates suited for leisure stays.

hotels.name: City Center Suites Berlin
hotels.description: Modern apartment-style hotel in central Berlin offering studios and one-bedroom units with kitchen facilities, ideal for extended stays.

hotels.name: Harbor View Inn Lisbon
hotels.description: Charming inn overlooking Lisbon9s historic harborfront, with comfortable rooms and family options within walking distance of key sights.

hotels.name: Rome City Boutique Hotel
hotels.description: Elegant boutique hotel in Rome9s Centro Storico with stylish rooms and daily breakfast, walking distance to the Trevi Fountain and Spanish Steps.

hotels.name: Mountain Lodge Zermatt
hotels.description: Cozy alpine lodge in Zermatt offering classic rooms with breakfast and easy access to ski lifts and hiking trails, many rates with free cancellation.
